name: LIGHTPATH TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: LightPath Technologies, Inc. is a global optical components and systems manufacturer with facilities in the United States, China, and Latvia. The company produces precision molded lenses, infrared optical components, assemblies, modules, cameras, and thermal imaging systems. It serves defense, public safety, industrial, commercial, telecom, and medical markets, and has transitioned from component manufacturing toward higher-value optical engineered solutions, imaging subsystems, and camera systems through organic growth and acquisitions.

products.name: Precision Molded Lenses
products.description: Molded optical lenses for visible light applications.

products.name: Infrared Optical Components
products.description: Custom and catalog infrared optical elements and assemblies.

products.name: Infrared Lens Assemblies
products.description: High-performance catalog and custom infrared lens assemblies.

products.name: Optical Assemblies and Modules
products.description: Value-added optical assemblies and modules for various applications.

products.name: Thermal Imaging Cores
products.description: Custom thermal and night vision cores developed by Visimid Technologies.

products.name: Infrared Camera Systems
products.description: High-performance infrared camera systems and imaging solutions from G5 Infrared.

products.name: BlackDiamond Glass
products.description: Proprietary glass material used in infrared optical components and coatings.

products.name: Advanced Infrared Coatings
products.description: Industry-leading infrared coatings including for BlackDiamond glass, provided by G5 Infrared.
